<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
    <meta charset="UTF-8">
    <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
    <title>FIN-SIGHT Financial Intelligence Dashboard</title>
    <style>
        :root {
            --sticky-col-width: 360px;
            --primary: #0066cc;
            --primary-dark: #004c99;
            --success: #22c55e;
            --success-dark: #16a34a;
            --danger: #ef4444;
            --danger-dark: #dc2626;
            --warning: #f59e0b;
            --warning-dark: #d97706;
            --info: #3b82f6;
            --info-dark: #2563eb;
            --bg-main: #f8fafc;
            --bg-white: #ffffff;
            --text-primary: #1e293b;
            --text-secondary: #64748b;
            --border: #e2e8f0;
            --shadow-sm: 0 1px 2px 0 rgb(0 0 0 / 0.05);
            --shadow: 0 1px 3px 0 rgb(0 0 0 / 0.1), 0 1px 2px -1px rgb(0 0 0 / 0.1);
            --shadow-lg: 0 10px 15px -3px rgb(0 0 0 / 0.1), 0 4px 6px -4px rgb(0 0 0 / 0.1);
        }
        * { box-sizing: border-box; margin: 0; padding: 0; }
        body { font-family: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, "Segoe UI", Roboto, "Helvetica Neue", Arial, sans-serif; background: var(--bg-main); color: var(--text-primary); line-height: 1.6; }
        .dashboard-container { max-width: 1800px; margin: 0 auto; padding: 24px; }
        .header { background: #1e40af; color: white; padding: 1px 12px; border-radius: 6px; margin-bottom: 12px; box-shadow: var(--shadow); width: 100%; }
        .header h1 { font-size: 17px; font-weight: 700; margin-bottom: 1px; color: #fff; }
        .header p { opacity: 0.95; font-size: 14px; color: #fff; }
        .filters { background: var(--bg-white); padding: 16px; border-radius: 12px; margin-bottom: 12px; box-shadow: var(--shadow); display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(200px, 1fr)); gap: 12px; }
        .filter-group { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 8px; }
        .filter-group label { font-weight: 600; font-size: 14px; color: var(--text-secondary); text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.5px; }
        .filter-group input, .filter-group select { padding: 10px 12px; border: 1px solid var(--border); border-radius: 8px; font-size: 14px; transition: all 0.2s; }
        .filter-group input:focus, .filter-group select:focus { outline: none; border-color: var(--primary); box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px rgba(0, 102, 204, 0.1); }
        .btn { padding: 10px 20px; border: none; border-radius: 8px; cursor: pointer; font-weight: 600; font-size: 14px; transition: all 0.2s; }
        .btn-primary { background: var(--primary); color: white; }
        .btn-primary:hover { background: var(--primary-dark); transform: translateY(-1px); box-shadow: var(--shadow); }
        .tabs { display: flex; gap: 6px; margin-bottom: 12px; background: var(--bg-white); padding: 8px; border-radius: 12px; box-shadow: var(--shadow); overflow-x: auto; flex-wrap: nowrap; position: sticky; top: 0; z-index: 40; }
        .tab { padding: 12px 20px; border: none; background: transparent; cursor: pointer; font-weight: 600; font-size: 13px; border-radius: 8px; transition: all 0.2s; color: var(--text-secondary); white-space: nowrap; }
        .tab:hover { background: rgba(0, 102, 204, 0.05); color: var(--primary); }
        .tab.active { background: var(--primary); color: white; }
        .content-panel { display: none; background: var(--bg-white); padding: 12px 16px; border-radius: 12px; box-shadow: var(--shadow); overflow-x: hidden; }
        .content-panel.active { display: block; }
        .section { margin-bottom: 2px; }
        .section-title { font-size: 17px; font-weight: 700; color: var(--text-primary); margin: 0 0 2px 0; padding: 0 0 2px 0; border-bottom: 1px solid var(--primary); }
        .data-table { width: 100%; border-collapse: collapse; margin-top: 8px; font-size: 14px; }
        .data-table thead { background: linear-gradient(135deg, #334155 0%, #1e293b 100%); color: white; }
        .data-table th { padding: 14px 12px; text-align: left; font-weight: 600; font-size: 13px; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.5px; }
        .data-table th.num { text-align: right; }
        .data-table td { padding: 12px; border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border); }
        .data-table.pl-income-table td { padding: 4px 10px; line-height: 1.35; }
        .data-table.pl-income-table th { padding: 8px 10px; }
        .data-table.pl-income-table .row-level-1,
        .data-table.pl-income-table .row-level-2,
        .data-table.pl-income-table .row-subtotal,
        .data-table.pl-income-table .row-total { line-height: 1.4; }
        .data-table.pl-income-table .row-hierarchy-subtotal td,
        .data-table.pl-income-table .row-hierarchy-detail td { padding: 3px 10px; }
        .data-table.compact-table td { padding: 4px 10px; line-height: 1.35; }
        .data-table.compact-table th { padding: 8px 10px; }
        .data-table.compact-table tr td { padding: 4px 10px; }
        .data-table.compact-table .row-level-3 td,
        .data-table.compact-table .row-level-4 td,
        .data-table.compact-table .row-subtotal td,
        .data-table.compact-table .row-total td { line-height: 1.4; }
        .data-table td.num { text-align: right; font-variant-numeric: tabular-nums; }
        .data-table td.account-col { text-align: left; }
        .data-table tbody tr:hover { background: rgba(0, 102, 204, 0.03); }
        .row-level-1 { background: linear-gradient(135deg, #cbd5e1 0%, #94a3b8 100%) !important; font-weight: 700 !important; font-size: 15px; color: var(--text-primary) !important; }
        .row-level-2 { background: linear-gradient(135deg, #e2e8f0 0%, #cbd5e1 100%) !important; font-weight: 700 !important; padding-left: 24px !important; }
        .row-level-3 { background: #f1f5f9 !important; font-weight: 700 !important; padding-left: 48px !important; }
        .row-level-4 { padding-left: 72px !important; font-size: 13px; color: var(--text-secondary); }
        /* Balance Sheet: main head and sub-heads – bold, distinct backgrounds; sub-heads show no value (—) */
        #bsContent .row-level-1,#liabilitiesContent .row-level-1,#financingContent .row-level-1 { background: linear-gradient(135deg, #334155 0%, #1e293b 100%) !important; color: #fff !important; font-weight: 700 !important; font-size: 15px !important; }
        #bsContent .row-bs-sub.row-bs-depth-1,#liabilitiesContent .row-bs-sub.row-bs-depth-1,#financingContent .row-bs-sub.row-bs-depth-1 { background: linear-gradient(135deg, #475569 0%, #334155 100%) !important; color: #fff !important; font-weight: 700 !important; }
        #bsContent .row-bs-sub.row-bs-depth-2,#liabilitiesContent .row-bs-sub.row-bs-depth-2,#financingContent .row-bs-sub.row-bs-depth-2 { background: linear-gradient(135deg, #64748b 0%, #475569 100%) !important; color: #fff !important; font-weight: 700 !important; }
        #bsContent .row-bs-sub.row-bs-depth-3,#liabilitiesContent .row-bs-sub.row-bs-depth-3,#financingContent .row-bs-sub.row-bs-depth-3 { background: linear-gradient(135deg, #94a3b8 0%, #64748b 100%) !important; color: #1e293b !important; font-weight: 700 !important; }
        #bsContent .row-bs-sub.row-bs-depth-4,#liabilitiesContent .row-bs-sub.row-bs-depth-4,#financingContent .row-bs-sub.row-bs-depth-4 { background: #cbd5e1 !important; color: #1e293b !important; font-weight: 700 !important; }
        #bsContent .row-bs-sub.row-bs-depth-5,#liabilitiesContent .row-bs-sub.row-bs-depth-5,#financingContent .row-bs-sub.row-bs-depth-5 { background: #e2e8f0 !important; color: #1e293b !important; font-weight: 700 !important; }
        #bsContent .row-hierarchy-detail,#liabilitiesContent .row-hierarchy-detail,#financingContent .row-hierarchy-detail { background: #f8fafc !important; color: var(--text-secondary); }
        #bsContent .row-hierarchy-detail:nth-child(even),#liabilitiesContent .row-hierarchy-detail:nth-child(even),#financingContent .row-hierarchy-detail:nth-child(even) { background: #fff !important; }
        #bsContent .num.bs-sub-empty,#liabilitiesContent .num.bs-sub-empty,#financingContent .num.bs-sub-empty { color: rgba(100,116,139,0.7); }
        #bsContent .row-bs-depth-3 .num.bs-sub-empty,#liabilitiesContent .row-bs-depth-3 .num.bs-sub-empty,#financingContent .row-bs-depth-3 .num.bs-sub-empty { color: #64748b; }
        #bsContent .row-bs-depth-4 .num.bs-sub-empty,#liabilitiesContent .row-bs-depth-4 .num.bs-sub-empty,#financingContent .row-bs-depth-4 .num.bs-sub-empty { color: #64748b; }
        #bsContent .row-bs-depth-5 .num.bs-sub-empty,#liabilitiesContent .row-bs-depth-5 .num.bs-sub-empty,#financingContent .row-bs-depth-5 .num.bs-sub-empty { color: #64748b; }
        .row-total { background: linear-gradient(135deg, #e0f2fe 0%, #bae6fd 100%) !important; font-weight: 700 !important; font-size: 15px; border-top: 2px solid var(--primary); border-bottom: 2px solid var(--primary); }
        .row-subtotal { background: #dbeafe !important; font-weight: 700 !important; font-size: 14px; }
        .row-hierarchy-subtotal { background: #bfdbfe !important; font-weight: 700 !important; }
        .positive { color: var(--success); }
        .negative { color: var(--danger); }
        .cf-favourable { background: rgba(34, 197, 94, 0.15) !important; color: var(--success-dark) !important; font-weight: 700 !important; }
        .cf-unfavourable { background: rgba(239, 68, 68, 0.15) !important; color: var(--danger-dark) !important; font-weight: 700 !important; }
        .row-level-1 .cf-favourable, .row-cf-parent .cf-favourable { background: rgba(34,197,94,0.25) !important; color: #14532d !important; font-weight: 700 !important; }
        .row-level-1 .cf-unfavourable, .row-cf-parent .cf-unfavourable { background: rgba(239,68,68,0.25) !important; color: #7f1d1d !important; font-weight: 700 !important; }
        .ratio-grid { display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(280px, 1fr)); gap: 20px; margin-top: 24px; }
        .ratio-card { background: linear-gradient(135deg, #ffffff 0%, #f8fafc 100%); padding: 24px; border-radius: 12px; box-shadow: var(--shadow); border-left: 4px solid var(--primary); transition: all 0.3s; }
        .ratio-card:hover { transform: translateY(-4px); box-shadow: var(--shadow-lg); }
        .ratio-card.good { border-left-color: var(--success); background: linear-gradient(135deg, #f0fdf4 0%, #dcfce7 100%); }
        .ratio-card.bad { border-left-color: var(--danger); background: linear-gradient(135deg, #fef2f2 0%, #fee2e2 100%); }
        .ratio-card.warn { border-left-color: var(--warning); background: linear-gradient(135deg, #fffbeb 0%, #fef3c7 100%); }
        .ratio-label { font-size: 13px; font-weight: 600; color: var(--text-secondary); text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.5px; margin-bottom: 8px; }
        .ratio-value { font-size: 32px; font-weight: 700; color: var(--text-primary); }
        .ratio-pct { font-size: 16px; font-weight: 600; color: var(--text-secondary); margin-top: 4px; }
        .chart-container { margin: 12px 0; padding: 16px; background: var(--bg-white); border-radius: 12px; box-shadow: var(--shadow); }
        .chart-title { font-size: 18px; font-weight: 700; margin-bottom: 12px; color: var(--text-primary); }
        .sankey-container { position: relative; padding: 40px 20px; }
        .sankey-flow { margin-bottom: 20px; display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 20px; }
        .sankey-label { flex: 0 0 200px; font-weight: 600; font-size: 15px; color: var(--text-primary); text-align: right; }
        .sankey-bar-container { flex: 1; position: relative; display: flex; align-items: center; }
        .sankey-bar { height: 50px; border-radius: 8px; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: flex-start; padding: 0 16px; color: white; font-weight: 700; font-size: 14px; transition: all 0.3s; box-shadow: var(--shadow); position: relative; overflow: visible; min-width: 180px; }
        .sankey-bar::before { content: ''; position: absolute; top: 0; left: 0; right: 0; bottom: 0; background: linear-gradient(90deg, rgba(255,255,255,0) 0%, rgba(255,255,255,0.2) 50%, rgba(255,255,255,0) 100%); animation: shimmer 2s infinite; }
        @keyframes shimmer { 0%, 100% { transform: translateX(-100%); } 50% { transform: translateX(100%); } }
        .sankey-bar:hover { transform: scaleY(1.15); box-shadow: var(--shadow-lg); }
        .sankey-value { position: relative; z-index: 1; }
        .sankey-pct { font-size: 12px; opacity: 0.9; margin-left: 8px; }
        .trend-chart { display: flex; align-items: flex-end; gap: 8px; padding: 20px 0; height: 300px; }
        .trend-bar { flex: 1; background: linear-gradient(to top, var(--primary), var(--primary-dark)); border-radius: 4px 4px 0 0; position: relative; transition: all 0.3s; min-width: 30px; }
        .trend-bar:hover { opacity: 0.8; transform: translateY(-4px); }
        .trend-bar-label { position: absolute; bottom: -24px; left: 50%; transform: translateX(-50%); font-size: 11px; font-weight: 600; color: var(--text-secondary); white-space: nowrap; }
        .trend-bar-value { position: absolute; top: -24px; left: 50%; transform: translateX(-50%); font-size: 11px; font-weight: 700; color: var(--text-primary); white-space: nowrap; }
        .info-box { background: #eff6ff; border-left: 4px solid var(--primary); padding: 16px; border-radius: 8px; margin: 16px 0; }
        .info-box p { margin: 4px 0; font-size: 14px; }
        .expandable { cursor: pointer; user-select: none; }
        .expandable:hover { background: rgba(0, 102, 204, 0.05); }
        .expand-icon { display: inline-block; margin-right: 8px; transition: transform 0.3s; font-size: 12px; }
        .expand-icon.rotated { transform: rotate(90deg); }
        .loading { text-align: center; padding: 60px 20px; color: var(--text-secondary); font-size: 16px; }
        .table-wrap { overflow-x: auto; -webkit-overflow-scrolling: touch; margin: 16px 0; border: 1px solid var(--border); border-radius: 8px; box-shadow: var(--shadow-sm); max-width: 100%; }
        .table-wrap .data-table { min-width: max-content; }
        .table-wrap .data-table th,
        .table-wrap .data-table td { white-space: nowrap; }
        .table-wrap .data-table td.account-col { white-space: normal; min-width: 320px; }
        .mini-table-wrap { overflow-x: auto; -webkit-overflow-scrolling: touch; border: 1px solid var(--border); border-radius: 10px; }
        .mini-table-wrap .mini-table { min-width: 560px; }
        .data-table th.sticky-col { position: sticky; left: 0; background: linear-gradient(135deg, #334155 0%, #1e293b 100%); z-index: 3; min-width: var(--sticky-col-width); width: var(--sticky-col-width); }
        .data-table td.sticky-col { position: sticky; left: 0; background: inherit; z-index: 2; min-width: var(--sticky-col-width); width: var(--sticky-col-width); }
        .row-hierarchy-subtotal { background: #e0f2fe !important; font-weight: 700 !important; }
        .row-hierarchy-detail { background: #fff; }
        .row-va-subtotal { background: #dbeafe !important; font-weight: 700 !important; }
        .row-va-total { background: #bfdbfe !important; font-weight: 700 !important; }
        .row-va-detail { background: #f8fafc; }
        .row-va-pl-income { background: #dcfce7 !important; }
        .row-va-pl-expense { background: #fee2e2 !important; }
        .row-va-bs-assets { background: #e0f2fe !important; }
        .row-va-bs-liab { background: #fef3c7 !important; }
        .row-va-bs-equity { background: #d1fae5 !important; }
        .chart-bar-row .bar-fill { color: #1e293b; text-shadow: 0 0 1px #fff, 0 0 2px #fff; min-width: 60px; }
        .chart-bar-row .bar-fill.bar-fill-low { color: #1e293b; }
        .row-cf-parent { background: #e2e8f0 !important; font-weight: 700 !important; }
        .row-cf-detail { padding-left: 28px !important; }
        .row-hierarchy-detail:nth-child(even) { background: #f8fafc; }
        .row-gross-profit { background: linear-gradient(135deg, #cffafe 0%, #a5f3fc 100%) !important; font-weight: 700; border-top: 2px solid var(--info); border-bottom: 1px solid var(--info); }
        .row-indirect-header { background: linear-gradient(135deg, #fef3c7 0%, #fde68a 100%) !important; font-weight: 700; }
        .row-profit { background: linear-gradient(135deg, #d1fae5 0%, #a7f3d0 100%) !important; font-weight: 700; color: var(--success-dark); border-top: 2px solid var(--success); border-bottom: 2px solid var(--success); }
        .chart-bar-row { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 12px; margin-bottom: 12px; }
        .chart-bar-row .label { flex: 0 0 120px; font-weight: 600; font-size: 14px; }
        .chart-bar-row .bar-wrap { flex: 1; height: 32px; background: #f1f5f9; border-radius: 6px; overflow: hidden; }
        .chart-bar-row .bar-fill { height: 100%; border-radius: 6px; display: flex; align-items: center; padding-left: 10px; color: #1e293b; font-weight: 700; font-size: 13px; text-shadow: 0 0 1px #fff, 0 1px 2px rgba(255,255,255,0.8); }
        .aging-charts-row { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 24px; width: 100%; margin-bottom: 24px; }
        .aging-line-chart { margin: 0; padding: 24px; background: linear-gradient(135deg, #f8fafc 0%, #f1f5f9 100%); border-radius: 12px; border: 1px solid var(--border); width: 100%; box-sizing: border-box; }
        .aging-line-chart .chart-title { font-size: 18px; font-weight: 700; margin-bottom: 16px; color: var(--text-primary); }
        .aging-line-chart svg { display: block; width: 100%; height: 280px; min-height: 240px; }
        .aging-line-chart .legend { display: flex; gap: 24px; margin-top: 12px; flex-wrap: wrap; }
        .aging-line-chart .legend span { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 600; }
        .aging-line-chart .legend .dot { width: 14px; height: 14px; border-radius: 50%; }
        .aging-month-grid { display: grid; gap: 12px; margin-top: 12px; }
        .aging-month-row { display: grid; grid-template-columns: 92px 1fr 1fr; gap: 10px; align-items: center; }
        .aging-month-label { font-size: 12px; font-weight: 700; color: var(--text-secondary); }
        .aging-month-bar { position: relative; height: 30px; border-radius: 7px; overflow: hidden; background: #e2e8f0; }
        .aging-month-fill { height: 100%; display: flex; align-items: center; font-size: 11px; font-weight: 800; color: #fff; padding: 0 8px; white-space: nowrap; }
        .aging-month-fill.rec { background: linear-gradient(90deg, var(--info), var(--info-dark)); }
        .aging-month-fill.pay { background: linear-gradient(90deg, var(--danger), var(--danger-dark)); }
        .aging-month-head { display: grid; grid-template-columns: 92px 1fr 1fr; gap: 10px; font-size: 11px; font-weight: 800; text-transform: uppercase; color: var(--text-secondary); margin-bottom: 4px; }
        .mini-tabs { display: inline-flex; gap: 6px; background: #eff6ff; border: 1px solid #bfdbfe; border-radius: 999px; padding: 4px; margin-bottom: 10px; }
        .mini-tab-btn { border: none; background: transparent; color: #1e3a8a; border-radius: 999px; padding: 6px 10px; font-size: 11px; font-weight: 800; cursor: pointer; }
        .mini-tab-btn.active { background: #1e40af; color: #fff; box-shadow: var(--shadow-sm); }
        
        .data-table th.sticky-col2 { position: sticky; left: var(--sticky-col-width); background: linear-gradient(135deg, #334155 0%, #1e293b 100%); z-index: 2; }
        .data-table td.sticky-col2 { position: sticky; left: var(--sticky-col-width); background: inherit; z-index: 1; }
        .row-operating-profit { background: linear-gradient(135deg, #e0e7ff 0%, #c7d2fe 100%) !important; font-weight: 700; border-top: 2px solid #6366f1; border-bottom: 1px solid #6366f1; }
        .kpi-strip { display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(240px, 1fr)); gap: 16px; margin-bottom: 16px; }
        .kpi-card { background: linear-gradient(135deg, #ffffff 0%, #f8fafc 100%); padding: 18px; border-radius: 12px; box-shadow: var(--shadow); border-left: 4px solid var(--primary); }
        .kpi-card .label { font-size: 12px; font-weight: 700; color: var(--text-secondary); text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.6px; margin-bottom: 6px; }
        .kpi-card .value { font-size: 26px; font-weight: 800; }
        .kpi-card .sub { font-size: 13px; font-weight: 700; color: var(--text-secondary); margin-top: 6px; }
        .badge { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 6px; padding: 4px 10px; border-radius: 999px; font-size: 12px; font-weight: 800; background: #eef2ff; color: #4338ca; }
        .overview-layout { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 20px; }
        .overview-section { background: linear-gradient(135deg, #f8fafc 0%, #f1f5f9 100%); padding: 16px 20px; border-radius: 12px; border: 1px solid var(--border); }
        .overview-hero { background: linear-gradient(135deg, #eff6ff 0%, #dbeafe 100%); border-left: 4px solid var(--primary); }
        .overview-section-title { font-size: 16px; font-weight: 700; color: var(--text-primary); margin-bottom: 6px; padding-bottom: 4px; border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border); }
        .overview-desc { margin-bottom: 10px; font-size: 13px; color: var(--text-secondary); }
        .working-capital-box { max-width: 360px; padding: 12px; background: var(--bg-white); border-radius: 8px; box-shadow: var(--shadow-sm); }
        .wc-formula { font-size: 12px; font-weight: 600; color: var(--text-secondary); margin-bottom: 10px; }
        .overview-wc-table { margin-top: 0; }
        .overview-wc-table td { padding: 6px 10px; }
        .overview-panel { border-radius: 12px; overflow: hidden; box-shadow: var(--shadow); margin-bottom: 16px; }
        .overview-half-row { display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr; gap: 20px; align-items: start; }
        .overview-half-row .overview-panel { margin-bottom: 0; }
        @media (max-width: 900px) { .overview-half-row { grid-template-columns: 1fr; } }
        .overview-panel-header { background: linear-gradient(135deg, #1e40af 0%, #1e3a8a 100%); color: #fff; padding: 10px 16px; font-weight: 700; font-size: 15px; }
        .overview-panel-header-net { background: linear-gradient(135deg, #78350f 0%, #92400e 100%); color: #fff; }
        .overview-panel-content { padding: 16px; background: linear-gradient(180deg, #f0f9ff 0%, #e0f2fe 100%); }
        .overview-panel-content-net { background: linear-gradient(180deg, #fffbeb 0%, #fef3c7 100%); }
        .overview-panel-table { width: 100%; border-collapse: collapse; background: #fff; }
        .overview-panel-table th { background: #334155; color: #fff; padding: 8px 12px; text-align: left; font-size: 12px; text-transform: uppercase; }
        .overview-panel-table th.num { text-align: right; }
        .overview-panel-table td { padding: 8px 12px; border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border); }
        .overview-panel-table td.num { text-align: right; font-variant-numeric: tabular-nums; }
        .overview-indicators-plain { display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fill, minmax(180px, 1fr)); gap: 12px; }

/* ---------- CFO TOPBAR + INSIGHTS ---------- */

        (function initChartOfAccountsFile() {
            const el = document.getElementById('chartOfAccountsFile');
            if (el) el.addEventListener('change', function() {
                const f = this.files && this.files[0];
                if (!f) { chartOfAccountsCsv = ''; return; }
                const r = new FileReader();
                r.onload = function() { chartOfAccountsCsv = (r.result && typeof r.result === 'string') ? r.result : ''; };
                r.readAsText(f, 'UTF-8');
            });
        })();

        document.querySelectorAll('.tab').forEach(tab => {
            tab.addEventListener('click', () => {
                document.querySelectorAll('.tab').forEach(t => t.classList.remove('active'));
                document.querySelectorAll('.content-panel').forEach(p => p.classList.remove('active'));
                tab.classList.add('active');
                document.getElementById(tab.dataset.tab).classList.add('active');

// ---------- CFO HELPERS ----------
function safeNum(v){ return (typeof v === 'number' && isFinite(v)) ? v : 0; }

function fmtSigned(n){
    const cls = n < 0 ? 'negative' : 'positive';
    return `<span class="${cls}">${fmt(n)}</span>`;
}

function pctOf(val, total){
    total = total || 0;
    if (!total) return null;
    return (val / total) * 100;
}

function momPct(curr, prev){
    if (!prev) return null;
    return ((curr - prev) / Math.abs(prev)) * 100;
}

// Heat bucket based on normalized [-1..1]
function heatClass(n){
    n = safeNum(n);
    if (!n) return 'hm0';
    if (n > 0.25) return 'hm3';
    if (n > 0.12) return 'hm2';
    if (n > 0.05) return 'hm1';
    if (n < -0.25) return 'hn3';
    if (n < -0.12) return 'hn2';
    if (n < -0.05) return 'hn1';
    return 'hm0';
}


        function cellNumber(v) {
            // v can be a number or an object like {debit, credit, balance, pl}
            if (v === null || v === undefined) return 0;
            if (typeof v === 'number') return v;
            if (typeof v === 'string') {
                const n = Number(v);
                return Number.isFinite(n) ? n : 0;
            }
            if (typeof v === 'object') {
                if (typeof v.pl === 'number') return v.pl;
                if (typeof v.balance === 'number') return v.balance;
                // common keys fallback
                for (const k of ['amount','value','total']) {
                    if (typeof v[k] === 'number') return v[k];
                }
            }
            return 0;
        }

        async function fetchData() {
            const fromDate = document.getElementById('fromDate').value;
            const toDate = document.getElementById('toDate').value;
            const company = document.getElementById('company').value;
            const status = document.getElementById('status').value;

            const params = new URLSearchParams({ from_date: fromDate, to_date: toDate });
            if (company) params.append('company', company);
            if (status === 'all') params.append('include_draft', '1');
            const format = document.getElementById('format').value;
            if (format) params.append('format', format);
            if (chartOfAccountsCsv) params.append('chart_of_accounts_csv', chartOfAccountsCsv);

            try {
                const url = '/api/method/fin_sight_dashboard_api';
                const response = chartOfAccountsCsv
                    ? await fetch(url, { method: 'POST', headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/x-www-form-urlencoded' }, body: params })
                    : await fetch(`${url}?${params}`);
                const result = await response.json().catch(() => ({}));
                if (!response.ok) {
                    const err = result.exc_type || result.exception || result.message?.error || result.message || response.statusText || 'Server error';
                    console.error('API error:', response.status, err);
                    alert('Error ' + response.status + ': ' + (typeof err === 'string' ? err : JSON.stringify(err)));
                    return;
                }
                if (result.message) {
                    lastData = result.message;
                    if (lastData.error) {
                        console.error('API error:', lastData.error, lastData.traceback || '');
                        alert('API Error: ' + (typeof lastData.error === 'string' ? lastData.error : JSON.stringify(lastData.error)) + (lastData.traceback ? '\n\nSee console for traceback.' : ''));
                        return;
                    }
                    ['pl_income', 'pl_direct', 'pl_indirect'].forEach(id => expandedGroups.add(id));
                    renderAll();
                }
            } catch (error) {
                console.error('Error fetching data:', error);
                alert('Error loading data: ' + (error.message || 'Check console for details.'));
            }
        }
        window.fetchData = fetchData;

            }
            const wrap = document.createElement('div');

            wrap.parentNode.insertBefore(controls, wrap);

        function renderHierarchyBS(hierarchy, monthlyData, quarterlyData, timeCols, format, type) {
            let html = '';
            
            for (const [rootType, rtData] of Object.entries(hierarchy)) {
                const rtId = type + '_rt_' + rootType.replace(/[^a-zA-Z0-9]/g, '_');
                const rtExpanded = expandedGroups.has(rtId);
                const rtOpen = rtData.opening != null ? fmt(rtData.opening) : '-';
                const rtClose = rtData.closing != null ? fmt(rtData.closing) : '-';
                
                html += `<tr class="row-level-1 expandable row-bs-main">
                    <td class="account-col"><span class="expand-icon ${rtExpanded ? 'rotated' : ''}">▶</span> <strong>${rootType}</strong></td>
                    <td class="num">${rtOpen}</td><td class="num">${rtClose}</td>`;
                
                if (format !== 'annual') {
                    for (const col of timeCols) html += `<td class="num">—</td>`;
                }
                html += '</tr>';
                
                if (rtExpanded && rtData.account_types) {
                    for (const [accType, atData] of Object.entries(rtData.account_types)) {
                        const atId = rtId + '_at_' + accType.replace(/[^a-zA-Z0-9]/g, '_');
                        const atExpanded = expandedGroups.has(atId);
                        const atOpen = atData.opening != null ? fmt(atData.opening) : '-';
                        const atClose = atData.closing != null ? fmt(atData.closing) : '-';
                        
                        html += `<tr class="row-level-2 expandable row-bs-sub row-bs-depth-2" onclick="toggleGroup('${atId}')">
                            <td class="account-col"><span class="expand-icon ${atExpanded ? 'rotated' : ''}">▶</span> <strong>${accType}</strong></td>
                            <td class="num">—</td><td class="num">—</td>`;
                        
                        if (format !== 'annual') {
                            for (const col of timeCols) html += `<td class="num">—</td>`;
                        }
                        html += '</tr>';
                        
                        if (atExpanded && atData.parents) {
                            for (const [parent, paData] of Object.entries(atData.parents)) {
                                const paId = atId + '_pa_' + parent.replace(/[^a-zA-Z0-9]/g, '_');
                                const paExpanded = expandedGroups.has(paId);
                                
                                html += `<tr class="row-level-3 expandable row-bs-sub row-bs-depth-3" onclick="toggleGroup('${paId}')">
                                    <td class="account-col"><span class="expand-icon ${paExpanded ? 'rotated' : ''}">▶</span> <strong>${parent}</strong></td>
                                    <td class="num">—</td><td class="num">—</td>`;
                                
                                if (format !== 'annual') {
                                    for (const col of timeCols) html += `<td class="num">-</td>`;
                                }
                                html += '</tr>';
                                
                                if (paExpanded && paData.accounts) {
                                    for (const acc of paData.accounts) {
                                        html += `<tr class="row-level-4"><td class="account-col">${acc.account_name || acc.account}</td><td class="num">${fmt(acc.opening)}</td><td class="num">${fmt(acc.closing)}</td>`;
                                        
                                        if (format !== 'annual') {
                                            // For BS we need cumulative closing per period
                                            for (const col of timeCols) {
                                                const mData = acc[format === 'monthly' ? 'monthly' : 'quarterly'][col] || {};
                                                // Cumulative: opening + sum of all months up to this point
                                                let cumulative = acc.opening;
                                                if (format === 'monthly' && lastData.month_names) {
                                                    const idx = lastData.month_names.indexOf(col);
                                                    for (let i = 0; i <= idx; i++) {
                                                        const mn = lastData.month_names[i];
                                                        cumulative += (acc.monthly[mn] || {}).balance || 0;
                                                    }
                                                } else if (format === 'quarterly' && lastData.quarter_names) {
                                                    const idx = lastData.quarter_names.indexOf(col);
                                                    for (let i = 0; i <= idx; i++) {
                                                        const qn = lastData.quarter_names[i];
                                                        cumulative += (acc.quarterly[qn] || {}).balance || 0;
                                                    }
                                                }
                                                html += `<td class="num">${fmt(cumulative)}</td>`;
                                            }
                                        }
                                        html += '</tr>';
                                    }
                                }
                            }
                        }
                    }
                }
            }
            
            return html;
        }

        function renderCF() {
            const d = lastData;
            const cf = d.cash_flow || {};
            const format = getFormat();
            const timeCols = getTimeColumns();

            const opFav = (cf.net_cash_operating ?? cf.operating_total ?? 0) >= 0;
            const invFav = (cf.net_cash_investing ?? cf.investing_total ?? 0) >= 0;
            const finFav = (cf.net_cash_financing ?? cf.financing_total ?? 0) >= 0;
            const netFav = (cf.net_change_cash || 0) >= 0;

            const showOp = expandedGroups.has('cf_operating');
            const showInv = expandedGroups.has('cf_investing');
            const showFin = expandedGroups.has('cf_financing');

            const operatingTotal = cf.operating_total ?? cf.net_cash_operating ?? 0;
            const investingTotal = cf.investing_total ?? cf.net_cash_investing ?? 0;
            const financingTotal = cf.financing_total ?? cf.net_cash_financing ?? 0;


            // CF KPI cards
            const netChg = cf.net_change_cash || 0;
            const openCash = cf.opening_cash || 0;
            const closeCash = cf.closing_cash != null ? cf.closing_cash : (openCash + netChg);
            const cashRatio = openCash !== 0 ? ((netChg / Math.abs(openCash)) * 100) : 0;
            let html = `<div style="display:flex;gap:12px;flex-wrap:wrap;margin-bottom:18px">
                <div class="kpi2" style="flex:1;min-width:150px"><div class="k">Opening Cash</div><div class="v">${fmt(openCash)}</div></div>
                <div class="kpi2" style="flex:1;min-width:150px"><div class="k">Closing Cash</div><div class="v">${fmt(closeCash)}</div></div>
                <div class="kpi2" style="flex:1;min-width:150px"><div class="k">Net Change</div><div class="v" style="color:${netChg>=0?'var(--success)':'var(--danger)'}">${fmtSigned(netChg)}</div></div>
                <div class="kpi2" style="flex:1;min-width:150px"><div class="k">Operating</div><div class="v" style="color:${operatingTotal>=0?'var(--success)':'var(--danger)'}">${fmtSigned(operatingTotal)}</div></div>
                <div class="kpi2" style="flex:1;min-width:150px"><div class="k">Investing</div><div class="v" style="color:${investingTotal>=0?'var(--success)':'var(--danger)'}">${fmtSigned(investingTotal)}</div></div>
                <div class="kpi2" style="flex:1;min-width:150px"><div class="k">Financing</div><div class="v" style="color:${financingTotal>=0?'var(--success)':'var(--danger)'}">${fmtSigned(financingTotal)}</div></div>
            </div>`;

            // Waterfall bar chart of CF components
            const cfComponents = [
                {label: 'Operating', value: operatingTotal, color: operatingTotal >= 0 ? '#16a34a' : '#dc2626'},
                {label: 'Investing', value: investingTotal, color: investingTotal >= 0 ? '#16a34a' : '#dc2626'},
                {label: 'Financing', value: financingTotal, color: financingTotal >= 0 ? '#16a34a' : '#dc2626'},
                {label: 'Net Change', value: netChg, color: netChg >= 0 ? '#2563eb' : '#7c3aed'},
            ];
            const maxCF = Math.max(1, ...cfComponents.map(c => Math.abs(c.value)));
            html += '<div style="margin-bottom:18px"><h3 style="margin-bottom:8px">Cash Flow Components</h3>';
            cfComponents.forEach(c => {
                const pct = Math.max(2, (Math.abs(c.value) / maxCF) * 100);
                html += `<div class="chart-bar-row"><span class="label" style="min-width:100px">${c.label}</span><div class="bar-wrap"><div class="bar-fill" style="width:${pct}%;background:${c.color};color:#fff">${fmtSigned(c.value)}</div></div></div>`;
            });
            html += '</div>';

            html += '<h2 class="section-title">Cash Flow Statement</h2>';
            html += '<div class="table-wrap"><table class="data-table compact-table pl-income-table"><thead><tr><th class="sticky-col" style="text-align: left;">Activity</th><th class="num sticky-col2">Amount</th></tr></thead><tbody>';

            html += `<tr class="row-level-1 row-cf-parent expandable" onclick="toggleGroup('cf_operating')"><td class="account-col sticky-col"><span class="expand-icon ${showOp ? 'rotated' : ''}">▶</span> <strong>Operating Activities</strong></td><td class="num sticky-col2 ${opFav ? 'cf-favourable' : 'cf-unfavourable'}"><strong>${fmt(operatingTotal)}</strong></td></tr>`;
            if (showOp && (cf.operating || []).length) {
                for (const item of cf.operating) {
                    const amt = item.amount ?? 0;
                    const fav = amt >= 0;
                    html += `<tr class="row-cf-detail"><td class="account-col sticky-col">${escapeHtml(item.name || '')}</td><td class="num sticky-col2 ${fav ? 'cf-favourable' : 'cf-unfavourable'}">${fmt(amt)}</td></tr>`;
                }
            }

            html += `<tr class="row-level-1 row-cf-parent expandable" onclick="toggleGroup('cf_investing')"><td class="account-col sticky-col"><span class="expand-icon ${showInv ? 'rotated' : ''}">▶</span> <strong>Investing Activities</strong></td><td class="num sticky-col2 ${invFav ? 'cf-favourable' : 'cf-unfavourable'}"><strong>${fmt(investingTotal)}</strong></td></tr>`;
            if (showInv && (cf.investing || []).length) {
                for (const item of cf.investing) {
                    const amt = item.amount ?? 0;
                    const fav = amt >= 0;
                    html += `<tr class="row-cf-detail"><td class="account-col sticky-col">${escapeHtml(item.name || '')}</td><td class="num sticky-col2 ${fav ? 'cf-favourable' : 'cf-unfavourable'}">${fmt(amt)}</td></tr>`;

'rotated' : ''}">▶</span> <strong>Financing Activities</strong></td><td class="num sticky-col2 ${finFav ? 'cf-favourable' : 'cf-unfavourable'}"><strong>${fmt(financingTotal)}</strong></td></tr>`;

            html += '</tr></thead><tbody>';
            const cbAccounts = cf.cash_bank_accounts || [];

        let liveGoldTolaPkr = 0;
        let liveGoldTolausd = 0;
        let manualGoldTolaPkr = 0;

        function loadSavedGoldRate() {
            const saved = localStorage.getItem('goldRatePkrPerTola');
            if (saved) {
                const rate = parseFloat(saved);
                if (rate > 0) {
                    const inp = document.getElementById('goldManualRate');
                    if (inp) inp.value = rate;
                    manualGoldTolaPkr = rate;
                    updateGoldPkrDisplay(rate);
                }
            }
        }

        function saveGoldRate() {
            const inp = document.getElementById('goldManualRate');
            if (!inp) return;
            const rate = parseFloat(inp.value);
            if (rate > 0) {
                localStorage.setItem('goldRatePkrPerTola', rate);
                manualGoldTolaPkr = rate;
                updateGoldPkrDisplay(rate);
                const msg = document.getElementById('goldSavedMsg');
                if (msg) { msg.style.display = 'inline'; setTimeout(() => { msg.style.display = 'none'; }, 3000); }
                updateGoldCalc();
                updateGoldCmp();
            }
        }

        async function fetchSarmaayaRate() {
            const btn = document.getElementById('sarmaayaFetchBtn');
            if (btn) { btn.disabled = true; btn.textContent = 'Fetching...'; }
            try {
                const res = await fetch('/api/method/fin_gold_rate_api');
                const data = await res.json();
                const gd = data && data.message ? data.message : (data && data.data ? data.data : data);
                const pkr = parseFloat(gd && gd.sarmaaya_pkr ? gd.sarmaaya_pkr : 0);
                if (pkr > 0) {
                    const inp = document.getElementById('goldManualRate');
                    if (inp) inp.value = pkr;
                    localStorage.setItem('goldRatePkrPerTola', pkr);
                    manualGoldTolaPkr = pkr;
                    updateGoldPkrDisplay(pkr);
                    updateGoldCalc();
                    updateGoldCmp();
                    if (btn) { btn.disabled = false; btn.textContent = '\uD83D\uDCE1 Fetch from Sarmaaya.pk'; }
                } else {
                    alert('Could not auto-fetch from Sarmaaya.pk:\n' + (gd && gd.sarmaaya_error ? gd.sarmaaya_error : 'Gold price not found in page. Sarmaaya may have changed their layout.') + '\n\nPlease enter the rate manually from sarmaaya.pk/commodities/gold');
                    if (btn) { btn.disabled = false; btn.textContent = '\uD83D\uDCE1 Fetch from Sarmaaya.pk'; }
                }
            } catch(e) {
                alert('Network error fetching gold rate: ' + e.message);
                if (btn) { btn.disabled = false; btn.textContent = '\uD83D\uDCE1 Fetch from Sarmaaya.pk'; }
            }
        }

        function updateGoldPkrDisplay(rate) {
            const disp = document.getElementById('goldPkrDisplay');
            if (disp) disp.style.display = 'block';
            const gram = rate / 11.664;
            const el1 = document.getElementById('goldPkrTola');
            const el2 = document.getElementById('goldPkr10g');
            const el3 = document.getElementById('goldPkrGram');
            if (el1) el1.textContent = '\u20A8' + Math.round(rate).toLocaleString();
            if (el2) el2.textContent = '\u20A8' + Math.round(gram * 10).toLocaleString();
            if (el3) el3.textContent = '\u20A8' + Math.round(gram).toLocaleString();
            // Update market rate header in comparison tool
            const mktShow = document.getElementById('cmpMktRateShow');
            if (mktShow) mktShow.textContent = '\u20A8' + Math.round(rate).toLocaleString() + '/Tola';
        }

        async function fetchGoldRate() {
            const TOLA_GRAMS = 11.664;
            const TROY_OZ_GRAMS = 31.1035;
            loadSavedGoldRate();

            try {
                const res = await fetch('/api/method/fin_gold_rate_api');
                const data = await res.json();
                const gd = data && data.message ? data.message : (data && data.data ? data.data : data);

                const sarmaayaPkr = parseFloat(gd && gd.sarmaaya_pkr ? gd.sarmaaya_pkr : 0);
                const goldOzUsd = parseFloat(gd && gd.intl_usd_per_oz ? gd.intl_usd_per_oz : 0) || 3300;
                const usdPkr = parseFloat(gd && gd.usd_pkr ? gd.usd_pkr : 0) || 280;

                const goldGramUsd = goldOzUsd / TROY_OZ_GRAMS;
                const goldTolaUsd = goldGramUsd * TOLA_GRAMS;
                const goldTolaPkrCalc = goldTolaUsd * usdPkr;
                liveGoldTolaPkr = goldTolaPkrCalc;
                liveGoldTolausd = goldTolaUsd;

                // Auto-fill manual rate with Sarmaaya rate if not already saved
                if (sarmaayaPkr > 0 && manualGoldTolaPkr === 0) {
                    const inp = document.getElementById('goldManualRate');
                    if (inp && !inp.value) {
                        inp.value = sarmaayaPkr;
                        manualGoldTolaPkr = sarmaayaPkr;
                        localStorage.setItem('goldRatePkrPerTola', sarmaayaPkr);
                        updateGoldPkrDisplay(sarmaayaPkr);
                    }
                }

                // Show Pakistan rate cards
                if (sarmaayaPkr > 0) {
                    const curManual = manualGoldTolaPkr || sarmaayaPkr;
                    updateGoldPkrDisplay(curManual);
                }

                const liveTag = s => '<span style="font-size:10px;padding:1px 5px;border-radius:4px;background:' + (s === 'live' ? '#16a34a' : '#d97706') + ';color:#fff;margin-left:4px">' + (s === 'live' ? 'LIVE' : 'EST') + '</span>';
                const intlWidget = document.getElementById('goldIntlData');
                if (intlWidget) {
                    const pSource = sarmaayaPkr > 0 ? 'live' : 'estimate';
                    const pRate = sarmaayaPkr > 0 ? sarmaayaPkr : 0;
                    intlWidget.innerHTML = (sarmaayaPkr > 0 ? '<div class="kpi2" style="background:#fff8e1;min-width:160px"><div class="k">Pakistan 24K per Tola ' + liveTag('live') + '</div><div class="v" style="font-size:18px;color:#b45309">\u20A8' + Math.round(sarmaayaPkr).toLocaleString() + '</div><div style="font-size:10px;color:#92400e">Source: Sarmaaya.pk (Sarafa Market)</div></div>' : '') +
                        '<div class="kpi2" style="background:#fff8e1;min-width:130px"><div class="k">Intl Spot per Oz (USD) ' + liveTag(goldOzUsd !== 3300 ? 'live' : 'estimate') + '</div><div class="v" style="font-size:14px">$' + goldOzUsd.toFixed(2) + '</div></div>' +
                        '<div class="kpi2" style="background:#fff8e1;min-width:130px"><div class="k">Intl per Tola (USD) ' + liveTag(goldOzUsd !== 3300 ? 'live' : 'estimate') + '</div><div class="v" style="font-size:14px">$' + goldTolaUsd.toFixed(2) + '</div></div>' +
                        '<div class="kpi2" style="background:#fff8e1;min-width:110px"><div class="k">USD/PKR ' + liveTag(usdPkr !== 280 ? 'live' : 'estimate') + '</div><div class="v" style="font-size:14px">' + usdPkr.toFixed(2) + '</div></div>' +
                        '<div class="kpi2" style="background:#ffe4e6;min-width:160px"><div class="k">Calculated (Intl only, no duties)</div><div class="v" style="font-size:14px;color:#9ca3af">\u20A8' + Math.round(goldTolaPkrCalc).toLocaleString() + '</div></div>' +
                        '<div style="align-self:flex-end;font-size:10px;color:#92400e;padding:2px">\u26A0 Pakistan market is higher: 17% GST + import duties + Sarafa premium</div>';

        function updateGoldCalc() {
            const out = document.getElementById('goldCalcOut');
            if (!out) return;

            const tolaIn = parseFloat((document.getElementById('goldCalcTola') || {}).value || 0);
            const gstToggle = document.getElementById('goldGstToggle');
            const includeGst = gstToggle && gstToggle.checked;
            const gstFactor = includeGst ? 1.17 : 1.0;

            // Update grams display
            const gramsEl = document.getElementById('tolaInGrams');
            if (gramsEl) gramsEl.textContent = tolaIn > 0 ? (tolaIn * 11.664).toFixed(2) + ' grams' : '0 grams';

            if (!tolaIn) {
                out.innerHTML = '<tr><td colspan="5" style="color:#92400e;text-align:center;padding:14px">Enter Tola quantity above to see comparison</td></tr>';
                return;
            }

            // Market rate
            const manualInp = parseFloat((document.getElementById('goldManualRate') || {}).value || 0);
            const baseMarket = manualInp > 0 ? manualInp : (manualGoldTolaPkr > 0 ? manualGoldTolaPkr : liveGoldTolaPkr);
            const mktRate = (baseMarket || 0) * gstFactor;
            const mktTotal = mktRate > 0 ? tolaIn * mktRate : null;
            const mktBadge = (manualInp > 0 || manualGoldTolaPkr > 0)
                ? ' <span style="font-size:10px;background:#16a34a;color:#fff;border-radius:3px;padding:1px 5px">Sarafa</span>'
                : ' <span style="font-size:10px;background:#d97706;color:#fff;border-radius:3px;padding:1px 5px">Intl</span>';
            const gstNote = includeGst ? ' <span style="font-size:10px;background:#7c3aed;color:#fff;border-radius:3px;padding:1px 4px">+GST</span>' : '';

            // Comparison rates from inputs
            const compRates = [];
            var colors = [
                {bg:'#f5f3ff', border:'#7c3aed', text:'#5b21b6', dot:'■'},
                {bg:'#f0f9ff', border:'#0284c7', text:'#0369a1', dot:'■'},
                {bg:'#f0fdf4', border:'#16a34a', text:'#15803d', dot:'■'}
            ];
            for (var ci = 1; ci <= 3; ci++) {
                var nameEl = document.getElementById('compRate' + ci + 'Name');
                var rateEl = document.getElementById('compRate' + ci);
                var rateVal = parseFloat((rateEl || {}).value || 0);
                if (rateVal > 0) {
                    compRates.push({
                        name: (nameEl && nameEl.value) || ('Rate ' + ci),
                        rate: rateVal * gstFactor,
                        c: colors[ci - 1]
                    });
                }
            }

            var rows = '';

            // Row builder
            function buildRow(label, rate, total, bg, textColor, dot, isMkt, histTotal) {
                var ratePerGram = rate / 11.664;
                var diffPkr = (mktTotal !== null && !isMkt) ? (total - mktTotal) : null;
                // % Diff: vs market for comparison rows; vs historical for market row
                var diffPct = null;
                if (!isMkt && mktTotal && mktTotal !== 0) {
                    diffPct = (total - mktTotal) / mktTotal * 100;
                } else if (isMkt && histTotal !== null && histTotal !== undefined && histTotal !== 0) {
                    diffPct = (total - histTotal) / histTotal * 100;
                }
                var diffHist = (histTotal !== null && histTotal !== undefined && total !== histTotal) ? (total - histTotal) : null;
                var diffStr = diffPkr !== null
                    ? '<span style="color:' + (diffPkr >= 0 ? '#16a34a' : '#dc2626') + ';font-weight:700">'
                        + (diffPkr >= 0 ? '+' : '') + '\u20A8' + Math.abs(Math.round(diffPkr)).toLocaleString()
                        + (diffPkr > 0 ? ' \u2191' : diffPkr < 0 ? ' \u2193' : '') + '</span>'
                    : '<span style="color:#64748b">\u2014</span>';
                var histStr = diffHist !== null
                    ? '<span style="color:' + (diffHist >= 0 ? '#16a34a' : '#dc2626') + ';font-weight:700">'
                        + (diffHist >= 0 ? '+' : '') + '\u20A8' + Math.abs(Math.round(diffHist)).toLocaleString()
                        + (diffHist > 0 ? ' \u2191' : diffHist < 0 ? ' \u2193' : '') + '</span>'
                    : '<span style="color:#64748b">\u2014</span>';
                var pctStr = diffPct !== null
                    ? '<span style="color:' + (diffPct >= 0 ? '#16a34a' : '#dc2626') + ';font-weight:700">'
                        + (diffPct >= 0 ? '+' : '') + diffPct.toFixed(1) + '%</span>'
                    : '<span style="color:#64748b">\u2014</span>';
                return '<tr style="background:' + bg + ';border-left:4px solid ' + (isMkt ? '#f59e0b' : (dot === '■' ? '' : '#ccc')) + '">'
                    + '<td style="color:' + textColor + ';font-weight:700;padding:10px 12px">' + dot + ' ' + label + gstNote + '</td>'
                    + '<td class="num" style="color:' + textColor + ';font-weight:700">\u20A8' + Math.round(rate).toLocaleString()
                    + '<br><span style="font-size:10px;font-weight:400;color:#64748b">\u20A8' + ratePerGram.toFixed(0) + '/g</span></td>'
                    + '<td class="num" style="color:' + textColor + ';font-weight:800;font-size:15px">\u20A8' + Math.round(total).toLocaleString() + '</td>'
                    + '<td class="num">' + diffStr + '</td>'
                    + '<td class="num">' + histStr + '</td>'
                    + '<td class="num">' + pctStr + '</td>'
                    + '</tr>';
            }

            // histTotal = total at first (Historical) comparison rate
            var histTotal = (compRates.length > 0) ? (tolaIn * compRates[0].rate) : null;

            // Market rate row first
            if (mktRate > 0) {
                rows += buildRow('\u2B50 Current Market Rate' + mktBadge, mktRate, mktTotal, '#fff8e1', '#78350f', '⭐', true, histTotal);
            } else {
                rows += '<tr style="background:#fff8e1"><td colspan="6" style="color:#92400e;padding:10px;font-size:12px">'
                    + '⚠ Enter today\'s Pakistan market rate in the <strong>"Enter Today\'s Pakistan Market Rate"</strong> field above to see current market value.'
                    + '</td></tr>';
            }

            // Comparison rate rows
            for (var ri = 0; ri < compRates.length; ri++) {
                var cr = compRates[ri];
                var total = tolaIn * cr.rate;
                // Historical row itself shows — in Diff vs Historical column
                var rowHistTotal = (ri === 0) ? null : histTotal;
                rows += buildRow(cr.name, cr.rate, total, cr.c.bg, cr.c.text, cr.c.dot, false, rowHistTotal);
            }

            // Summary footer if we have at least market + 1 comparison
            if (mktRate > 0 && compRates.length > 0) {
                var notes = '';
                for (var ni = 0; ni < compRates.length; ni++) {
                    var cr2 = compRates[ni];
                    var tot2 = tolaIn * cr2.rate;
                    var d = tot2 - mktTotal;
                    notes += (ni > 0 ? '  ·  ' : '')
                        + '<strong>' + cr2.name + '</strong>: \u20A8' + Math.abs(Math.round(d)).toLocaleString()
                        + (d >= 0 ? ' more \u2191' : ' less \u2193') + ' than market'
                        + ' (' + (d >= 0 ? '+' : '') + (d / mktTotal * 100).toFixed(1) + '%)';
                }
                rows += '<tr style="background:#f8fafc"><td colspan="6" style="padding:8px 12px;font-size:11px;color:#475569">'
                    + '\u2139\uFE0F For <strong>' + tolaIn + ' Tola</strong> (' + (tolaIn * 11.664).toFixed(2) + 'g): ' + notes + '</td></tr>';
            }

            out.innerHTML = rows;
        }

        function updateGoldCmp() {
            const tolaIn = parseFloat(document.getElementById('cmpTola') && document.getElementById('cmpTola').value || 0);
            const rateA = parseFloat(document.getElementById('cmpRateA') && document.getElementById('cmpRateA').value || 0);
            const rateB = parseFloat(document.getElementById('cmpRateB') && document.getElementById('cmpRateB').value || 0);
            const labelA = (document.getElementById('cmpLabelA') && document.getElementById('cmpLabelA').value) || 'Rate A';
            const labelB = (document.getElementById('cmpLabelB') && document.getElementById('cmpLabelB').value) || 'Rate B';
            const out = document.getElementById('goldCmpOut');
            if (!out) return;
            if (!tolaIn) {
                out.innerHTML = '<tr><td colspan="6" style="color:#92400e;text-align:center;padding:12px">Enter Tola amount and rates above to compare</td></tr>';
                return;
            }

            const manualInp = parseFloat(document.getElementById('goldManualRate') && document.getElementById('goldManualRate').value || 0);
            const mktRate = manualInp > 0 ? manualInp : (manualGoldTolaPkr > 0 ? manualGoldTolaPkr : liveGoldTolaPkr);
            const mktRateG = mktRate / 11.664;
            const mktTotal = tolaIn * mktRate;
            const grams = tolaIn * 11.664;

            function buildRow(label, rate, bgColor, textColor, isMkt) {
                const rateG = rate / 11.664;
                const total = tolaIn * rate;
                const diff = isMkt ? 0 : (total - mktTotal);
                const pct = mktTotal !== 0 ? (diff / mktTotal) * 100 : 0;
                const diffColor = diff > 0 ? '#16a34a' : diff < 0 ? '#dc2626' : '#64748b';
                const diffStr = isMkt ? '<span style="color:#64748b">—</span>' : (diff >= 0 ? '+' : '') + '\u20A8' + Math.abs(Math.round(diff)).toLocaleString();
                const pctStr = isMkt ? '<span style="color:#64748b">—</span>' : '<span style="color:' + diffColor + ';font-weight:700">' + (diff >= 0 ? '+' : '') + pct.toFixed(2) + '%</span>';
                return '<tr style="background:' + bgColor + '">' +
                    '<td style="color:' + textColor + ';font-weight:600;padding:10px 12px">' + label + '</td>' +
                    '<td class="num" style="color:' + textColor + ';font-weight:700;font-size:14px">\u20A8' + Math.round(rate).toLocaleString() + '</td>' +
                    '<td class="num" style="color:' + textColor + '">\u20A8' + Math.round(rateG).toLocaleString() + '</td>' +
                    '<td class="num" style="color:' + textColor + ';font-weight:700;font-size:14px">\u20A8' + Math.round(total).toLocaleString() + '</td>' +
                    '<td class="num" style="color:' + diffColor + ';font-weight:600">' + diffStr + '</td>' +
                    '<td class="num">' + pctStr + '</td>' +
                    '</tr>';
            }

            let rows = '';
            if (mktRate > 0) {
                rows = rows + buildRow('\u2B50 Current Market Rate (' + tolaIn + ' Tola)', mktRate, '#fff8e1', '#78350f', true);
            }
            if (rateA > 0) {
                rows = rows + buildRow('\u25A0 ' + labelA + ' (' + tolaIn + ' Tola)', rateA, '#eff6ff', '#1e40af', false);
            }
            if (rateB > 0) {
                rows = rows + buildRow('\u25A0 ' + labelB + ' (' + tolaIn + ' Tola)', rateB, '#f5f3ff', '#6d28d9', false);
            }
            if (!rows) {
                out.innerHTML = '<tr><td colspan="6" style="color:#92400e;text-align:center;padding:12px">Enter at least one rate (A or B) to compare</td></tr>';
                return;
            }

            // Summary note
            const notes = [];
            if (rateA > 0 && mktRate > 0) {
                const diffA = (rateA - mktRate);
                notes.push(labelA + ' is ' + (diffA >= 0 ? '\u2191 ' : '\u2193 ') + '\u20A8' + Math.abs(Math.round(diffA)).toLocaleString() + '/Tola vs Market (' + (diffA >= 0 ? '+' : '') + ((diffA / mktRate) * 100).toFixed(1) + '%)');
            }
            if (rateB > 0 && mktRate > 0) {
                const diffB = (rateB - mktRate);
                notes.push(labelB + ' is ' + (diffB >= 0 ? '\u2191 ' : '\u2193 ') + '\u20A8' + Math.abs(Math.round(diffB)).toLocaleString() + '/Tola vs Market (' + (diffB >= 0 ? '+' : '') + ((diffB / mktRate) * 100).toFixed(1) + '%)');
            }
            if (notes.length) {
                rows = rows + '<tr style="background:#f8fafc"><td colspan="6" style="color:#475569;font-size:11px;padding:6px 12px">\u2139 ' + notes.join('  \u00B7  ') + ' \u00B7 Grams: ' + grams.toFixed(2) + 'g</td></tr>';
            }
            out.innerHTML = rows;
        }

        function buildComparativeBarChart(months, dataA, dataB, colorA, colorB, labelA, labelB, title) {
            if (!months.length) return '';
            const maxV = Math.max(1, ...months.map(m => Math.max(dataA[m] || 0, dataB[m] || 0)));
            let out = '<div style="margin-bottom:20px"><h3 style="margin-bottom:10px">' + title + '</h3>';
            out += '<div class="aging-month-head"><div style="flex:0 0 80px">Month</div><div>' + labelA + '</div><div>' + labelB + '</div></div>';
            out += '<div class="aging-month-grid">';
            months.forEach(mn => {
                const va = dataA[mn] || 0;
                const vb = dataB[mn] || 0;
                const wa = Math.max(2, (va / maxV) * 100);
                const wb = Math.max(2, (vb / maxV) * 100);
                out += `<div class="aging-month-row">
                    <div class="aging-month-label" style="flex:0 0 80px">${escapeHtml(mn)}</div>
                    <div class="aging-month-bar"><div class="aging-month-fill rec" style="background:${colorA};width:${wa}%">${fmt(va)}</div></div>
                    <div class="aging-month-bar"><div class="aging-month-fill pay" style="background:${colorB};width:${wb}%">${fmt(vb)}</div></div>
                </div>`;
            });
            out += '</div>';
            // Summary table
            out += '<div class="table-wrap" style="margin-top:10px"><table class="data-table compact-table"><thead><tr>';
            out += '<th>Month</th><th class="num">' + labelA + '</th><th class="num">' + labelB + '</th><th class="num">Difference</th><th class="num">' + labelA + ' Change</th><th class="num">%</th></tr></thead><tbody>';
            months.forEach((mn, idx) => {
                const va = dataA[mn] || 0;
                const vb = dataB[mn] || 0;
                const diff = va - vb;
                const prevMn = idx > 0 ? months[idx - 1] : null;
                const prevVa = prevMn ? (dataA[prevMn] || 0) : null;
                const chg = prevVa == null ? null : va - prevVa;
                const pct = (prevVa == null || prevVa === 0) ? null : (chg / Math.abs(prevVa)) * 100;
                out += `<tr>
                    <td>${escapeHtml(mn)}</td>
                    <td class="num">${fmt(va)}</td>
                    <td class="num">${fmt(vb)}</td>
                    <td class="num">${fmtSigned(diff)}</td>
                    <td class="num">${chg == null ? '—' : fmtSigned(chg)}</td>
                    <td class="num">${pct == null ? '—' : `<span class="${pct >= 0 ? 'positive' : 'negative'}">${pct.toFixed(1)}%</span>`}</td>
                </tr>`;
            });
            out += '</tbody></table></div></div>';
            return out;
        }

        function renderCharts() {
            const d = lastData;
            const pl = d.profit_loss || {};
            const format = getFormat();

            // Sankey-style P&L flow (like Papermoney.ai image)
            let html = '<div class="chart-container"><div class="chart-title">Income Statement Flow</div><div class="sankey-container">';
            
            const maxVal = Math.max(Math.abs(pl.total_income || 0), Math.abs(pl.total_direct_expense || 0), Math.abs(pl.total_indirect_expense || 0), Math.abs(pl.gross_profit || 0), Math.abs(pl.net_profit || 0), 1);
            const scale = (val) => Math.max((Math.abs(val) / maxVal) * 100, 5);
            const totalRev = pl.total_income || 1;
            function sankeyRow(label, val, pct, color1, color2) {
                return `<div class="sankey-flow">
                    <div class="sankey-label">${label}</div>
                    <div class="sankey-bar-container">
                        <div class="sankey-bar" style="width: ${scale(val)}%; min-width: 180px; background: linear-gradient(135deg, ${color1}, ${color2});">
                            <span class="sankey-value">${fmt(val)}   <span class="sankey-pct">${fmtPct(pct)}%</span></span>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                </div>`;
            }
            html += sankeyRow('Revenue', pl.total_income, 100, 'var(--success)', 'var(--success-dark)');
            html += sankeyRow('Cost of Goods Sold (COGS)', pl.total_direct_expense, (pl.total_direct_expense / totalRev) * 100, 'var(--danger)', 'var(--danger-dark)');
            html += sankeyRow('Gross Profit', pl.gross_profit, (pl.gross_profit / totalRev) * 100, 'var(--info)', 'var(--info-dark)');
            html += sankeyRow('Operating Expenses', pl.total_indirect_expense, (pl.total_indirect_expense / totalRev) * 100, 'var(--warning)', 'var(--warning-dark)');
            html += sankeyRow('Profit', pl.net_profit, (pl.net_profit / totalRev) * 100, 'var(--success)', 'var(--success-dark)');
            
            html += '</div></div>';

            // Sales bar charts: Monthly, Quarterly, Annual
            if (d.month_names && d.month_names.length > 0) {
                const incomeByMonth = pl.income_by_month || {};
                const maxMonthly = Math.max(...Object.values(incomeByMonth), 1);
                html += '<div class="chart-container"><div class="chart-title">Sales – Monthly Bar Chart</div><div class="trend-chart">';
                for (const mn of d.month_names) {
                    const val = incomeByMonth[mn] || 0;

        function renderAging() {
            const d = lastData;
            const rec = d.aging_receivables || {};
            const pay = d.aging_payables || {};
            const recBucketsList = rec.by_bucket || [];
            const payBucketsList = pay.by_bucket || [];
            const bucketLabels = ['0-30 days', '31-60 days', '61-90 days', '90+ days'];
            const recVals = bucketLabels.map(lbl => (recBucketsList.find(b => b.bucket === lbl) || {}).amount || 0);
            const payVals = bucketLabels.map(lbl => (payBucketsList.find(b => b.bucket === lbl) || {}).amount || 0);
            const maxVal = Math.max(1, ...recVals, ...payVals);
            const pad = 50; const w = 940; const h = 260;
            const xScale = (i) => pad + (i / Math.max(1, bucketLabels.length - 1)) * (w - 2 * pad);
            const yScale = (v) => h - pad - (v / maxVal) * (h - 2 * pad);
            const recPoints = recVals.map((v, i) => xScale(i) + ',' + yScale(v)).join(' ');
            const payPoints = payVals.map((v, i) => xScale(i) + ',' + yScale(v)).join(' ');

            const recRun2 = rec.running_by_month || {};
            const payRun2 = pay.running_by_month || {};
            const agRunMonths = (d.month_names && d.month_names.length)
                ? d.month_names
                : (Object.keys(recRun2).length ? Object.keys(recRun2).sort() : Object.keys(payRun2).sort());

            function buildLineChart(months, dataMap, color, title) {
                if (!months.length) return '';
                const vals = months.map(m => dataMap[m] || 0);
                const maxV = Math.max(1, ...vals);
                const minV = 0;
                const padL = 68, padR = 20, padT = 28, padB = 38;
                const cW = 940, cH = 200;
                const xs = (i) => padL + (i / Math.max(1, months.length - 1)) * (cW - padL - padR);
                const ys = (v) => padT + (1 - (v - minV) / (maxV - minV)) * (cH - padT - padB);
                let out = '<div class="aging-line-chart" style="margin-bottom:18px">';
                out += '<div class="chart-title">' + title + '</div>';
                out += '<svg viewBox="0 0 ' + cW + ' ' + cH + '" style="width:100%;height:200px">';
                for (let i = 0; i <= 4; i++) {
                    const gv = maxV * (1 - i / 4);
                    const gy = ys(gv);
                    out += '<line x1="' + padL + '" y1="' + gy + '" x2="' + (cW - padR) + '" y2="' + gy + '" stroke="#e2e8f0" stroke-width="1"/>';
                    out += '<text x="' + (padL - 5) + '" y="' + (gy + 4) + '" text-anchor="end" font-size="10" fill="#64748b">' + fmt(Math.round(gv)) + '</text>';
                }
                const pts = months.map((m, i) => xs(i) + ',' + ys(vals[i])).join(' ');
                if (months.length > 1) {
                    const areaPath = 'M' + xs(0) + ',' + ys(vals[0]) + ' ' + months.map((m, i) => 'L' + xs(i) + ',' + ys(vals[i])).join(' ') + ' L' + xs(months.length - 1) + ',' + ys(0) + ' L' + xs(0) + ',' + ys(0) + ' Z';
                    out += '<path d="' + areaPath + '" fill="' + color + '" fill-opacity="0.08"/>';
                }
                out += '<polyline fill="none" stroke="' + color + '" stroke-width="2.5" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" points="' + pts + '"/>';
                months.forEach((m, i) => {
                    const cx = xs(i);
                    const cy = ys(vals[i]);
                    out += '<circle cx="' + cx + '" cy="' + cy + '" r="4" fill="' + color + '"/>';
                    const above = cy > padT + 22;
                    out += '<text x="' + cx + '" y="' + (above ? cy - 8 : cy + 18) + '" text-anchor="middle" font-size="9.5" font-weight="700" fill="' + color + '">' + fmt(vals[i]) + '</text>';
                    out += '<text x="' + cx + '" y="' + (cH - 6) + '" text-anchor="middle" font-size="10" fill="#64748b">' + escapeHtml(m) + '</text>';
                });
                out += '</svg></div>';
                return out;
            }

            let html = '<div style="margin-bottom:8px">';
            html += buildLineChart(agRunMonths, recRun2, '#2563eb', 'Monthly Receivables Closing Balance');
            html += buildLineChart(agRunMonths, payRun2, '#dc2626', 'Monthly Payables Closing Balance');
            html += '</div>';

            html += '<div class="aging-charts-row"><div class="aging-line-chart"><div class="chart-title">Aging Buckets Comparison (Receivables vs Payables)</div>';
            html += '<svg viewBox="0 0 ' + w + ' ' + (h + 32) + '" preserveAspectRatio="none" style="width:100%;height:300px">';
            for (let i = 0; i <= 4; i++) {
                const y = pad + ((h - 2 * pad) / 4) * i;
                const val = Math.round(maxVal * (1 - i / 4));
                html += '<line x1="' + pad + '" y1="' + y + '" x2="' + (w - pad) + '" y2="' + y + '" stroke="#e2e8f0" stroke-width="1"/>';
                html += '<text x="' + (pad - 8) + '" y="' + (y + 4) + '" text-anchor="end" font-size="10" fill="#64748b">' + fmt(val) + '</text>';
            }
            bucketLabels.forEach((lbl, i) => {
                const x = xScale(i);
                html += '<line x1="' + x + '" y1="' + (h - pad) + '" x2="' + x + '" y2="' + (h - pad + 6) + '" stroke="#64748b" stroke-width="1"/>';
                html += '<text x="' + x + '" y="' + (h + 18) + '" text-anchor="middle" font-size="11" fill="#64748b">' + lbl.replace(' days', '') + '</text>';
            });
            html += '<polyline fill="none" stroke="var(--info)" stroke-width="2.5" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" points="' + recPoints + '"/>';
            html += '<polyline fill="none" stroke="var(--danger)" stroke-width="2.5" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" points="' + payPoints + '"/>';
            recVals.forEach((v, i) => {
                const x = xScale(i); const y = yScale(v);
                html += '<circle cx="' + x + '" cy="' + y + '" r="4" fill="var(--info)"/>';
                html += '<text x="' + x + '" y="' + (y - 8) + '" text-anchor="middle" font-size="10" font-weight="700" fill="#1d4ed8">' + fmt(v) + '</text>';
            });
            payVals.forEach((v, i) => {
                const x = xScale(i); const y = yScale(v);
                html += '<circle cx="' + x + '" cy="' + y + '" r="4" fill="var(--danger)"/>';
                html += '<text x="' + x + '" y="' + (y + 18) + '" text-anchor="middle" font-size="10" font-weight="700" fill="#b91c1c">' + fmt(v) + '</text>';
            });
            html += '</svg>';
            html += '<div class="legend"><span><span class="dot" style="background: var(--info);"></span>Receivables</span><span><span class="dot" style="background: var(--danger);"></span>Payables</span></div>';
            html += '<p style="margin-top: 12px; font-weight: 700;">Total Receivables (GL): ' + fmt(rec.total) + '  |  Total Payables (GL): ' + fmt(pay.total) + '</p></div>';

            const recRun = rec.running_by_month || {};
            const payRun = pay.running_by_month || {};
            const runMonths = (d.month_names && d.month_names.length) ? d.month_names : (Object.keys(recRun).length ? Object.keys(recRun).sort() : Object.keys(payRun).sort());
            if (runMonths.length > 0) {
                const maxRun = Math.max(1, ...runMonths.map(m => recRun[m] || 0), ...runMonths.map(m => payRun[m] || 0));
                html += '<div class="aging-line-chart"><div class="chart-title">Monthly Closing Trend (with value labels)</div>';
                html += '<div class="aging-month-head"><div>Month</div><div>Receivables</div><div>Payables</div></div><div class="aging-month-grid">';
                runMonths.forEach(mn => {
                    const rv = recRun[mn] || 0;
                    const pv = payRun[mn] || 0;
                    const rw = Math.max(4, (rv / maxRun) * 100);
                    const pw = Math.max(4, (pv / maxRun) * 100);
                    html += `<div class="aging-month-row"><div class="aging-month-label">${escapeHtml(mn)}</div><div class="aging-month-bar"><div class="aging-month-fill rec" style="width:${rw}%">${fmt(rv)}</div></div><div class="aging-month-bar"><div class="aging-month-fill pay" style="width:${pw}%">${fmt(pv)}</div></div></div>`;
                });
                html += '</div>';
                html += '<div class="table-wrap" style="margin-top:12px"><table class="data-table compact-table"><thead><tr><th>Month</th><th class="num">Receivables</th><th class="num">Payables</th><th class="num">Gap (Rec-Pay)</th><th class="num">Rec Change</th><th class="num">Rec %</th><th class="num">Pay Change</th><th class="num">Pay %</th></tr></thead><tbody>';
                runMonths.forEach((mn, idx) => {
                    const recVal = safeNum(recRun[mn]);
                    const payVal = safeNum(payRun[mn]);
                    const gap = recVal - payVal;
                    const prev = idx > 0 ? runMonths[idx - 1] : null;
                    const prevRec = prev ? safeNum(recRun[prev]) : null;
                    const prevPay = prev ? safeNum(payRun[prev]) : null;
                    const recDiff = prevRec == null ? null : recVal - prevRec;
                    const payDiff = prevPay == null ? null : payVal - prevPay;
                    const recPct = (prevRec == null || prevRec == 0) ? null : (recDiff / Math.abs(prevRec)) * 100;
                    const payPct = (prevPay == null || prevPay == 0) ? null : (payDiff / Math.abs(prevPay)) * 100;
                    html += `<tr><td>${escapeHtml(mn)}</td><td class="num">${fmt(recVal)}</td><td class="num">${fmt(payVal)}</td><td class="num">${fmtSigned(gap)}</td><td class="num">${recDiff == null ? 'â' : fmtSigned(recDiff)}</td><td class="num">${recPct == null ? 'â' : `<span class="${recPct >= 0 ? 'positive' : 'negative'}">${recPct.toFixed(1)}%</span>`}</td><td class="num">${payDiff == null ? 'â' : fmtSigned(payDiff)}</td><td class="num">${payPct == null ? 'â' : `<span class="${payPct >= 0 ? 'negative' : 'positive'}">${payPct.toFixed(1)}%</span>`}</td></tr>`;
                });
                html += '</tbody></table></div></div></div>';
            } else {
                html += '</div>';
            }

            const customerGroupRun = rec.customer_group_running_by_month || {};
            const customerGroups = Object.keys(customerGroupRun || {}).sort((left, right) => {
                const leftLast = runMonths.length ? safeNum((customerGroupRun[left] || {})[runMonths[runMonths.length - 1]]) : 0;
                const rightLast = runMonths.length ? safeNum((customerGroupRun[right] || {})[runMonths[runMonths.length - 1]]) : 0;
                return rightLast - leftLast;
            });
            if (customerGroups.length && runMonths.length) {
                const latestMonth = runMonths[runMonths.length - 1];
                const latestMax = Math.max(1, ...customerGroups.map(group => safeNum((customerGroupRun[group] || {})[latestMonth])));
                html += '<h3 style="margin-top: 24px; margin-bottom: 12px;">Monthly Closing Trend (with value labels) - Customer Group Wise</h3>';
                html += '<div class="table-wrap"><table class="data-table compact-table"><thead><tr><th class="sticky-col" style="text-align:left">Customer Group</th>';
                for (const col of runMonths) { html += `<th class="num">${escapeHtml(col)}</th>`; }
                html += '<th class="num">Latest Closing</th></tr></thead><tbody>';
                for (const group of customerGroups) {
                    const monthMap = customerGroupRun[group] || {};
                    const latestValue = safeNum(monthMap[latestMonth]);
                    html += `<tr><td class="account-col sticky-col">${escapeHtml(group)}</td>`;
                    for (const col of runMonths) { html += `<td class="num">${fmt(safeNum(monthMap[col]))}</td>`; }
                    html += `<td class="num"><strong>${fmt(latestValue)}</strong></td></tr>`;
                }
                html += '</tbody></table></div>';
                html += '<div class="aging-line-chart" style="margin-top:12px"><div class="chart-title">Latest Closing by Customer Group</div>';
                for (const group of customerGroups) {

                    const width = Math.max(4, (latestValue / latestMax) * 100);
