                }
                html += '</div>';
            }

            html += '<h3 style="margin-bottom: 16px;">Aging Receivables (Outstanding Sales Invoices by Due Date)</h3>';
            const recBuckets = rec.by_bucket || [];
            const maxRec = recBuckets.length ? Math.max(...recBuckets.map(b => b.amount), 1) : 1;
            for (const b of recBuckets) { const pct = (b.amount / maxRec) * 100; html += `<div class="chart-bar-row"><span class="label">${b.bucket}</span><div class="bar-wrap"><div class="bar-fill" style="width: ${pct}%; background: linear-gradient(90deg, var(--info), var(--info-dark));">${fmt(b.amount)}</div></div></div>`; }
            html += `<p style="margin-top: 12px; font-weight: 700;">Total Receivables: ${fmt(rec.total)}</p>`;
            html += '<div class="table-wrap"><table class="data-table" style="margin-top: 24px;"><thead><tr><th>Aging Bucket</th><th class="num">Amount</th></tr></thead><tbody>';
            for (const b of recBuckets) { html += `<tr><td>${b.bucket}</td><td class="num">${fmt(b.amount)}</td></tr>`; }
            html += `<tr class="row-total"><td>Total</td><td class="num">${fmt(rec.total)}</td></tr></tbody></table></div>`;

            html += '<h3 style="margin-top: 32px; margin-bottom: 16px;">Aging Payables (Outstanding Purchase Invoices)</h3>';
            const maxPay = payBucketsList.length ? Math.max(...payBucketsList.map(b => b.amount), 1) : 1;
            for (const b of payBucketsList) { const pct = (b.amount / maxPay) * 100; html += `<div class="chart-bar-row"><span class="label">${b.bucket}</span><div class="bar-wrap"><div class="bar-fill" style="width: ${pct}%; background: linear-gradient(90deg, var(--danger), var(--danger-dark));">${fmt(b.amount)}</div></div></div>`; }
            html += `<p style="margin-top: 12px; font-weight: 700;">Total Payables: ${fmt(pay.total)}</p>`;
            html += '<div class="table-wrap"><table class="data-table" style="margin-top: 24px;"><thead><tr><th>Aging Bucket</th><th class="num">Amount</th></tr></thead><tbody>';
            for (const b of payBucketsList) { html += `<tr><td>${b.bucket}</td><td class="num">${fmt(b.amount)}</td></tr>`; }
            html += `<tr class="row-total"><td>Total</td><td class="num">${fmt(pay.total)}</td></tr></tbody></table></div>`;

            document.getElementById('agingContent').innerHTML = html;
        }

        function renderVertical() {

                for (const col of timeCols) { html += `<th class="num">${col}</th><th class="num">%</th>`; }
            }

            const plRows = va_pl;
            for (let i = 0; i < plRows.length; i++) {
                const item = plRows[i];
                const sec = item.section || '';
                let rowClass = (sec === 'income' ? ' row-va-pl-income' : '') + (sec === 'direct_expense' || sec === 'indirect_expense' ? ' row-va-pl-expense' : '') + (item.is_subtotal ? ' row-va-subtotal' : ' row-va-detail');
                html += `<tr class="${rowClass}"><td class="account-col sticky-col">${item.is_subtotal ? '<strong>' : ''}${escapeHtml(item.name || '')}${item.is_subtotal ? '</strong>' : ''}</td><td class="num">${fmt(item.amount)}</td><td class="num va-pct-col">${fmtPct(item.percent)}</td>`;
                if (format !== 'annual' && timeCols.length) {

            html += '</tbody></table></div>';

            html += '<h3 style="margin-top: 20px; margin-bottom: 10px;">Balance Sheet – Assets: % of Total Assets (100%); Liabilities & Equity: % of Liab.+Equity (100%)</h3>';

            if (format !== 'annual' && timeCols.length) {

                let rowClass = (sec === 'assets' ? ' row-va-bs-assets' : '') + (sec === 'liabilities' ? ' row-va-bs-liab' : '') + (sec === 'equity' ? ' row-va-bs-equity' : '') + (item.is_subtotal ? ' row-va-subtotal' : ' row-va-detail');
                html += `<tr class="${rowClass}"><td class="account-col sticky-col">${item.is_subtotal ? '<strong>' : ''}${escapeHtml(item.name || '')}${item.is_subtotal ? '</strong>' : ''}</td><td class="num">${fmt(item.amount)}</td><td class="num va-pct-col">${fmtPct(item.percent)}</td>`;
                if (format !== 'annual' && timeCols.length) {
                    for (const col of timeCols) {
                        const periodRows = format === 'monthly' ? (va_bs_by_month[col] || []) : (va_bs_by_quarter[col] || []);
                        const periodItem = periodRows[i];
                        html += `<td class="num">${fmt(periodItem && periodItem.amount)}</td><td class="num va-pct-col">${fmtPct(periodItem && periodItem.percent)}</td>`;

        function renderHorizontal() {
            const d = lastData;
            const format = getFormat();
            const timeCols = getTimeColumns();

            const ha_bs_detail = d.horizontal_analysis_bs_detail || [];

            const ha_bs_by_quarter = d.horizontal_analysis_bs_by_quarter || {};

            let html = '<h3 style="margin-bottom: 10px;">Income Statement Trend</h3>';
            html += '<div class="table-wrap"><table class="data-table compact-table pl-income-table"><thead><tr><th class="sticky-col" style="text-align: left;">Item</th><th class="num">Current</th>';
            if (format !== 'annual' && timeCols.length) {
                for (const col of timeCols) html += `<th class="num">${col}</th><th class="num">Chg%</th>`;

            html += '</tr></thead><tbody>';

                const item = ha_pl[i];
                const sec = item.section || '';
                const rowClass = (item.is_subtotal ? ' row-va-subtotal' : '') + (sec === 'income' ? ' row-va-pl-income' : '') + (sec === 'direct_expense' || sec === 'indirect_expense' ? ' row-va-pl-expense' : '') + (!item.is_subtotal && !sec ? ' row-va-detail' : '');
                html += `<tr class="${rowClass || ' row-va-detail'}"><td class="account-col sticky-col">${item.is_subtotal ? '<strong>' : ''}${escapeHtml(item.name || '')}${item.is_subtotal ? '</strong>' : ''}</td><td class="num">${fmt(item.current)}</td>`;
                if (format !== 'annual' && timeCols.length) {
                    for (let j = 0; j < timeCols.length; j++) {
                        const col = timeCols[j];

                        const periodItem = periodRows[i];
                        const amt = periodItem && periodItem.amount != null ? periodItem.amount : 0;
                        const prevRows = j > 0 ? (format === 'monthly' ? (ha_pl_by_month[timeCols[j - 1]] || []) : (ha_pl_by_quarter[timeCols[j - 1]] || [])) : [];
                        const prevItem = prevRows[i];
                        const priorAmt = prevItem && prevItem.amount != null ? prevItem.amount : 0;
                        const chgPct = (j > 0 && priorAmt) ? (((amt - priorAmt) / Math.abs(priorAmt)) * 100) : null;
                        const chgCls = chgPct > 0 ? 'positive' : (chgPct < 0 ? 'negative' : '');
                        html += `<td class="num">${fmt(amt)}</td><td class="num ${chgCls}">${fmtPct(chgPct)}</td>`;
                    }
                }
                html += '</tr>';
            }
            html += '</tbody></table></div>';

            html += '<h3 style="margin-top: 20px; margin-bottom: 10px;">Balance Sheet Trend</h3>';
            html += '<div class="table-wrap"><table class="data-table compact-table pl-income-table"><thead><tr><th class="sticky-col" style="text-align: left;">Item</th><th class="num">Opening</th><th class="num">Closing</th><th class="num">Change %</th>';
            if (format !== 'annual' && timeCols.length) {
                for (const col of timeCols) html += `<th class="num">${col}</th><th class="num">Chg%</th>`;
            }
            html += '</tr></thead><tbody>';
            for (let i = 0; i < ha_bs.length; i++) {
                const item = ha_bs[i];
                const sec = item.section || '';
                let rowClass = (sec === 'assets' ? ' row-va-bs-assets' : '') + (sec === 'liabilities' ? ' row-va-bs-liab' : '') + (sec === 'equity' ? ' row-va-bs-equity' : '') + (item.is_subtotal ? ' row-va-subtotal' : ' row-va-detail');
                const chg = item.change_percent;
                const cls = chg > 0 ? 'positive' : (chg < 0 ? 'negative' : '');
                html += `<tr class="${rowClass}"><td class="account-col sticky-col">${item.is_subtotal ? '<strong>' : ''}${escapeHtml(item.name || '')}${item.is_subtotal ? '</strong>' : ''}</td><td class="num">${fmt(item.opening)}</td><td class="num">${fmt(item.closing)}</td><td class="num ${cls}">${fmtPct(chg)}</td>`;
                if (format !== 'annual' && timeCols.length) {
                    for (let j = 0; j < timeCols.length; j++) {
                        const col = timeCols[j];
                        const periodRows = format === 'monthly' ? (ha_bs_by_month[col] || []) : (ha_bs_by_quarter[col] || []);

                        const chgPct = (j > 0 && priorAmt) ? (((amt - priorAmt) / Math.abs(priorAmt)) * 100) : null;

                        html += `<td class="num">${fmt(amt)}</td><td class="num ${chgCls}">${fmtPct(chgPct)}</td>`;
                    }
                }
                html += '</tr>';
            }
            html += '</tbody></table></div>';

            document.getElementById('horizontalContent').innerHTML = html;
        }

        function ratioClass(name, val) {
            if (val == null) return '';
            if (name === 'net_margin' || name === 'gross_margin') {
                if (val >= 20) return 'good';
                if (val >= 10) return 'warn';
                return 'bad';
            }
            if (name === 'return_on_equity' || name === 'return_on_assets') {
                if (val >= 15) return 'good';
                if (val >= 8) return 'warn';
                return 'bad';
            }
            if (name === 'debt_to_equity') {
                if (val <= 1) return 'good';
                if (val <= 2) return 'warn';
                return 'bad';
            }
            return '';
        }

        function renderNotes() {
            const d = lastData;
            const n = d.notes || {};
            const rp = n.reporting_period || {};
            const kf = n.key_figures || {};
            
            let html = '<div class="info-box">';
            html += `<p><strong>Reporting Period:</strong> ${rp.from_date} to ${rp.to_date}</p>`;
            html += `<p><strong>Basis of Preparation:</strong> ${n.basis || 'N/A'}</p>`;
            html += '</div>';

            html += '<h3 style="margin-top: 24px; margin-bottom: 16px;">Key Figures Summary</h3>';
            html += '<table class="data-table"><thead><tr><th style="text-align: left;">Figure</th><th class="num">Amount</th></tr></thead><tbody>';
            for (const [key, val] of Object.entries(kf)) {
                html += `<tr><td class="account-col">${key}</td><td class="num">${fmt(val)}</td></tr>`;

            html += '</tbody></table>';

            document.getElementById('notesContent').innerHTML = html;
        }

        // Initialize dates: default Monthly with last 3 months
        const today = new Date();
        const threeMonthsAgo = new Date(today.getFullYear(), today.getMonth() - 2, 1);
        document.getElementById('toDate').value = today.toISOString().split('T')[0];
        document.getElementById('fromDate').value = threeMonthsAgo.toISOString().split('T')[0];

        // Fetch companies
        fetch('/api/resource/Company?fields=["name"]&limit_page_length=100')
            .then(r => r.json())
            .then(data => {
                const select = document.getElementById('company');
                (data.data || []).forEach(c => {
                    const opt = document.createElement('option');
                    opt.value = c.name;
                    opt.textContent = c.name;
                    select.appendChild(opt);
                });
            });
